title: rosa cinnamomea malyi
intro: Rosa cinnamomea malyi, also known as the Malayan cinnamon rose, is a type of flowering plant in the rose family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate pain. The plant is typically prepared as an herbal tea or infused oil, although more information is needed to confirm its effectiveness and preparation methods.
